chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-297 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 2260/2024 2.For orders on MA 2261/2024 3.For hearing of Bail Application 13-05-2024 Mr. Arif Ali Abbasi, Advocate along with applicant. ****** 1. Urgency is granted. 2&3. Applicant Shahid Khan Khushk seeks protective bail in Crime No.01 of 2024, registered at P.S, ACE, Khairpur, for offences under Sections 161 & 342 PPC r/w section 5 PCA-II of 1947. It is, inter-alia, contended that the applicant is innocent and has falsely been implicated in this case by the police; that the applicant is ready to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends his imminent arrest at the hands of police as NBWs have been issued against him by the trial Court. Hence, he seeks protection of law. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for period of six days is granted to the applicant subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/-(Thirty Thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of aforesaid period or the date when the applicant surrenders before the concerned Court, whichever occurs earlier. Meanwhile, operation of NBWs issued in the above crime shall remain suspended for the above period. The bail application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
